title: Beehiiv vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Feature & Price Comparison
intro: Beehiiv and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators and publishers seeking monetization opportunities, while Campaign Monitor caters to agencies and teams managing multiple client brands. Understanding their core strengths will help you choose the right tool for your email marketing strategy.

comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies and teams managing multiple brands

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program
comparison_table.tool_b: Journey designer, transactional email, multi-brand management

choose_a_if: You're building a newsletter and want to monetize through ads or sponsorships
You're starting out and need a completely free tier with up to 2,500 subscribers
You prefer a growth-focused platform with affiliate partnership opportunities
choose_b_if: You manage email campaigns for multiple clients or brands
You need advanced automation features like journey designer and transactional emails
You want a more established platform with 20+ years of experience in email marketing

faq.q: Is Beehiiv better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Neither is objectively 'better'—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers seeking growth and monetization, while Campaign Monitor is superior for agencies managing multiple brands with advanced automation needs. Beehiiv has higher user satisfaction ratings (4.7 on G2 vs 4.1), but Campaign Monitor offers more mature, agency-focused features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Beehiiv is significantly cheaper for small publishers, offering a free tier up to 2,500 subscribers with no payment required. Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month with no free option. However, both platforms' pricing scales with subscriber count, so the gap narrows as you grow larger lists.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports. You can typically export your subscriber data from Campaign Monitor and import it into Beehiiv. However, your email templates and automation workflows won't transfer automatically, so you'll need to recreate those within Beehiiv's interface.
